summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form documenting the End of Treatment visit for patient BRC471-FR01-005 at site FR-01 in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The patient discontinued treatment on 07 December 2023 due to radiographic disease progression after achieving partial response, having completed 5 full cycles with a relative dose intensity of 92.5%.
content:
eCRF -- END OF TREATMENT (EOT) VISIT
Study: BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 | Form v2.1 | Site: FR-01 | Patient: BRC471-FR01-005
EOT Date: 08 December 2023 | Last dose: 07 December 2023
Entered: M.Leconte | Verified: Dr. C. Dupont (Medical Monitor)

REASON FOR DISCONTINUATION
  [X] Radiographic disease progression (RECIST v1.1)
  Date of progression confirmed by BICR: 28 November 2023
  Cycle at discontinuation: Cycle 6 (Day 168)

TOTAL TREATMENT DURATION
  First dose: 15 June 2023 | Last dose: 07 December 2023
  Cycles completed: 5 (partial cycle 6)
  Total planned dose: 11,200 mg | Actual: 10,360 mg
  Relative Dose Intensity: 92.5%
  Dose reductions: 0 | Dose interruptions: 1 (14 days, C4, nausea)

BEST OVERALL RESPONSE (per BICR)
  [X] Partial Response (PR) -- first response C2 (Day 58)
  Duration of response: 98 days

EOT ASSESSMENTS
  Physical exam: Yes | Blood tests: Yes | CT scan: Yes
  ECG: Yes | ctDNA sample: Yes | PROs: Yes

POST-STUDY TREATMENT
  Next therapy: Platinum-based chemotherapy (carboplatin/pemetrexed)
  ctDNA resistance profiling: Results pending (3 weeks)

Investigator: Dr. C. Moreau   Sig: [SIGNED]   Date: 08/12/2023
